title: lotononis calycina
intro: Lotononis calycina is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Kamassi plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lotononis calycina include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
